name: Tempeh Tahiti
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the barbecue sauce, water, ginger, garlic, pineapple, red bell pepper, and celery.
2. Bring to a simmer over moderate heat.
3. Simmer until the peppers and celery are tender but still crisp, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the cubed tempeh and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Stir in the snow peas and cook just until bright green, less than 5 minutes.
6. Serve over cooked brown rice.
Serves 4 to 6
Calories per serving: 330
Grams of fat: 6.2
Percentage of fat calories: 17%
Cholesterol: 0 mg.
